instruction: Plainspoken product narration. Keep the live receipt and inspection path on screen.

scenes.title: Hook
scenes.text: A reviewer clicks Kill Agent and gets a Memory Will receipt with a Walrus blob id.

scenes.title: Pressure
scenes.text: Private budget notes stay blocked while the successor reads approved memory.

scenes.title: Live action
scenes.text: Now write the will to Walrus, then open the cold successor.

scenes.title: Result
scenes.text: Receipt fields show blob id, redactions, replay trace, role, and model output hash.

scenes.title: Inspection
scenes.text: Inspect Proof reads Walrus plus Sui object fields.

scenes.title: Reopen
scenes.text: In a second browser context, the latest-will path opens the same receipt.
